title: Speaking - Part 3
description: You are going to read a magazine article about an intellectual process known as critical thinking. For questions 31 – 36, choose the answer (A, B, C or D) which you think fits best according to the text. Mark your answers on the separate answer sheet.

content.task: Discuss how the rise of online shopping has affected these aspects of local communities, then decide which two changes are the most concerning.

script.text: Now, I’d like you to talk about something together for about two minutes. Here are some consequences of the shift to online shopping.
Now decide which two consequences are the most worrying for the future of our towns.
